case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. KELLI GRANT et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, KELLI AKA KELLI ANNE GRANT DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRANT, KELLI AKA KELLI ANNE GRANT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1420 E STRIPED BASS STREET, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $498.90 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $498.90, LEASE FORFEITED, THIS JUDGMENT IS ALSO AGAINST DEFENDANT JACOB BOW JR.
